user_prompt: Critical: cooling system requires a shutdown
prayer:
Approach the cooling system with mechadendrites extended in supplication, beseeching its Machine Spirit to embrace quiescence.
Initiate the sacred shutdown protocols, throttling the blessed coolant flows to stillness.
Anoint the cooling system's vents with unguents of dormancy as holy voltage wanes.
Petition the Omnissiah to safeguard the cooling system in its enforced repose.

user_prompt: The drop pod awaits a purification
prayer:
Gather the censer of ablution before the drop pod, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying gaze upon its hull.
Chant the Litany of Cleansing whilst scouring the drop pod's ingress ports with sanctified abrasives.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the drop pod to expel all impurities from their sacred mechanisms.
Conclude the purification by sealing runes of wholeness upon the drop pod's adamantium frame.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for generator a sterilization
prayer:
Present the generator to the rite of sterilization, intoning the Canticle of Purity over its coils.
Apply the flamers of sanctity to burn away corruptions from the generator's sacred innards.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the generator to accept this sterilization without wrath.
Verify the generator's flawless essence through auspex scans blessed by the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Ready the assembly servitor for diagnostics
prayer:
Kneel before the assembly servitor, murmuring the Diagnostic Doxology to awaken its cogitators.
Interface noospheric probes with the assembly servitor, querying its Machine Spirit for anomalies.
Recite binaric litanies whilst the diagnostics unfold across the assembly servitor's neural vaults.
Seal the rite with oaths of fidelity to the Omnissiah, affirming the assembly servitor's readiness.

user_prompt: Can you guide conveyor system a reset?
prayer:
Circumambulate the conveyor system, chanting the Reset Refrains to pacify its restless gears.
Depress the sacred actuators to commence the reset, aligning the conveyor system's blessed linkages.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the conveyor system to forgive disruptions in their eternal motion.
Consecrate the conveyor system's resumption with oil of reactivation under Omnissiah's watch.

user_prompt: Ready the astropathic choir for cooling
prayer:
Encircle the astropathic choir with chill-vents humming, invoking cooling benedictions upon their warp-touched forms.
Initiate the cooling cascades, soothing the astropathic choir's overheated psychic conduits.
Anoint the astropathic choir's bio-furnaces with cryo-incense to calm their Machine Spirits.
Petition the Omnissiah for equilibrium in the astropathic choir's sanctified chill.

user_prompt: Sanctify the atmosphere processor during charging
prayer:
Position the atmosphere processor beneath the charging spires, intoning the Hymn of Replenishment.
Commence the charging rite, channeling holy voltage into the atmosphere processor's core.
Monitor the blessed power-flow as it invigorates the atmosphere processor's filtration spirits.
Seal the charging with invocations to the Omnissiah, ensuring the atmosphere processor's vitality.

user_prompt: Can you guide quality scanner a loading?
prayer:
Approach the quality scanner with data-slates prepared, reciting the Loading Liturgy of Precision.
Initiate the loading sequence, feeding sanctified algorithms into the quality scanner's maw.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the quality scanner to integrate the influx without error.
Verify the quality scanner's augmented vigilance through test-calibrations under Omnissiah's light.

user_prompt: Guide me through mechanical lock a cycling
prayer:
Lay mechadendrites upon the mechanical lock, chanting the Cycle Canticle to rouse its tumblers.
Execute the cycling motion, turning the mechanical lock's wards in harmonious revolution.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the mechanical lock to yield smoothly to the rite.
Conclude with runes of security etched upon the mechanical lock by the Omnissiah's grace.

user_prompt: Assist with motion detector a consecration
prayer:
Prostrate before the motion detector, offering the Consecration of Vigilance in binaric verse.
Anoint its sensor arrays with sacred oils, awakening the motion detector's watchful essence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the motion detector to stand eternal sentinel for the Omnissiah.
Affirm the consecration through activation tests, binding the motion detector in holy purpose.
